title: Disposable Plastic Polythene Multi-Purpose Gloves - 100pcs
features: Plastic Disposable Gloves - these gloves offer excellent toughness and flexibility. They are durable, resistant to breaking and tearing, and provide a comfortable, smooth touch. Easy to put on, these gloves are free from holes and leaks. They also extend to cover part of the wrist, offering extra protection from splashes and messes.

One Size - These lightweight, disposable gloves are designed for easy on and off, suitable for light-duty kitchen and food prep tasks. They fit most adults, both men and women, thanks to their unisex design. Shaped like a human hand and universally fitting both left and right hands, they offer flexibility and an anti-skid sanded surface for better grip. Ideal for food handling in both commercial and home settings, these gloves keep your hands clean and odor-free.

Comfortable - These gloves slide on effortlessly, providing convenience and ease of use. They help maintain a sanitary work environment, making them ideal for serving food, eating messy items like BBQ, cleaning, and any situation where you want to keep your hands clean.

Wide Application - These disposable gloves are versatile and perfect for various tasks, including food prep and handling, sandwich assembly, BBQ, restaurant and deli tasks, meat preparation, dishwashing, kitchen tasks, household cleaning, food service, household chores, medical exams, painting, arts and crafts, beauty and hair salons, industrial applications, laboratory work, hairdressing, dental clinics, and pet feeding and cleaning.
description: Product Description Gatamo Plastic Gloves Gatamo disposable gloves offer maximum value. Whether used as a food service glove or to maintain hygiene in high-risk areas such as supermarkets, gas stations, restaurants, our plastic disposable gloves help prevent spread. This highly versatile plastic glove can be used in a variety of scenarios to minimize contact and ensure safety. These clear gloves are thick enough to protect and thin enough to complete the task. Our clear plastic gloves are suitable for almost all adults. One Size Fits All Transparant Plastic Gloves 100 Gloves Per Pack Suitable for Food Industries and General Household Use. Strong & Water resistent Water resistent No sign of leaks Protective against oil Effective oil containment Suitable for food contact Protective for direct contact with food.
